message:
fix(conformance): FUNCTION STATS running_script is nil bulk, not integer

Redis FUNCTION STATS returns nil (bulk reply) for running_script when no
script is executing, not the integer 0. The existing function_stats_after_load
fixture encoded the element as {"kind": "integer", "value": 0}, which
diverged from live redis:7.4 behavior and was the last holdout after the
uppercase-FUNCTION-LIST engine fixes landed.

Swap that one element to {"kind": "bulk", "value": null} so the fixture
matches what a real server emits and the conformance harness stops
tripping on this case when comparing replies.

No code changes — fixture-only alignment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
